questions.question: What is the purpose of stop word removal in the NLP pipeline? (2 marks)
expectedPoints: Reduces the dimensionality of the text data
Allows the model to focus computational resources on more meaningful words

questions.question: Explain the process of syntactic and semantic analysis in Natural Language Processing. Use examples to illustrate your answer. (5 marks)
expectedPoints: Syntactic Analysis (Parsing): Analyzes grammatical structure. Creates a parse tree to show relationships between words (e.g., subject-verb-object).
Example: Parsing the sentence 'The dog chased the cat' to identify 'dog' as the subject and 'cat' as the object.
Semantic Analysis: Extracts the literal meaning from text. Understands the meaning of words and how they combine.
Involves Word Sense Disambiguation (e.g., resolving 'bank' to financial institution vs. river bank).
Involves Named Entity Recognition (e.g., identifying 'London' as a location).
Semantic analysis uses the syntactic structure to derive a deeper, meaning-based representation.
